evals.prompt: my obsidian vault is a mess, can you organize my notes into folders
evals.expected_output: Vault audited, loose files categorized by filename patterns, moved into topical folders, summary of changes reported

evals.prompt: I have a bunch of unfiled notes sitting in my Claude-Research folder. Can you sort them into subfolders?
evals.expected_output: Claude-Research directory scanned, loose files identified and categorized, moved into appropriate subfolders, zero loose files remaining

evals.prompt: tidy up my obsidian notes - there are files everywhere and I can't find anything
evals.expected_output: Full vault audit, folder taxonomy designed, files moved autonomously, clean tree structure reported with file counts per folder
